odoo:
# ---- sequences: auto-numbering for all document types ---- # each sequence generates formatted ids like ALLOC-00001, REQ-00001, etc. # company_id is set to False so sequences are shared across companies
# allocation request: ALLOC-XXXXX
Allocation Request Number fund.allocation_request ALLOC- 5
# requisition: REQ-XXXXX
Requisition Number fund.requisition REQ- 5
# transfer request: TRF-XXXXX
Transfer Request Number fund.transfer_request TRF- 5
# bill: BILL-XXXXX
Bill Number fund.bill BILL- 5
# incoming fund reference: INC-XXXXX
Incoming Fund Reference fund.incoming INC- 5
